title: DNA Extraction from Mouthwash Samples Using Qiagen DNeasy PowersoilPro Kit
author: Ahmed A Shibl
materials: Thaw the sample on ice for 00:30:00
Discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet

steps.title: Centrifuge the transferred sample at maximum...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the transferred sample at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) at 4°C for 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer the desired sample volume 1-2 mL into a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the desired sample volume 1-2 mL into a 1.5mL or 2mL eppendorf tube

steps.title: Repeat Step 1
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 1.1 if more volume is needed to see a pellet or a higher yield of DNA is required

steps.title: Add 800 µL of CD1 and vortex to resuspend pellet
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL of CD1 and vortex to resuspend pellet

steps.title: Spin down briefly
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly

steps.title: Transfer entire eppendorf content in a PowerBead Pro Tube
steps.instruction: Transfer entire eppendorf content in a PowerBead Pro Tube

steps.title: Secure PowerBead Pro tube onto the...
steps.instruction: Secure PowerBead Pro tube onto the bead beater and run at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:05:00

steps.title: Centrifuge the PowerBead Pro tube at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the PowerBead Pro tube at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:01:30

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant carefully, without disturbing...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant carefully, without disturbing the pellet, into a clean 2mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 200 µL of CD2 into...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of CD2 into the 2mL microcentrifuge tube and vortex for 00:00:10

steps.title: Centrifuge the 2mL microcentrifuge tube at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the 2mL microcentrifuge tube at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:01:30

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant carefully without disturbing...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet, into a clean 2mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 600 µL of CD3 into...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of CD3 into the 2 mL microcentrifuge tube and vortex for 00:00:10

steps.title: Load 650 µL of the lysate...
steps.instruction: Load 650 µL of the lysate onto MB spin columns and centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:01:30

steps.title: Discard flow-through and repeat step 13...
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through and repeat step 13 to consume all the lysate

steps.title: Place the spin column onto a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column onto a new collection tube, add 500 µL of EA, and centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:01:30

steps.title: Discard flow-through and place the spin...
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through and place the spin column back into the collection tube

steps.title: Add 500 µL of C5 onto...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of C5 onto the spin column and centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:01:30

steps.title: Discard flow-through and place the spin...
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through and place the spin column back into the collection tube

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:02:00 and place spin column into 1.5mL eppendorf (elution) tube

steps.title: Add 50-100 µL of nuclease-free water...
steps.instruction: Add 50-100 µL of nuclease-free water to the center of the spin column and leave at room temperature for 00:05:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed ( 17000 x g, °C, ) for 00:01:00 , quantify using Qubit, flash freeze, and store at -20/80 °C
